message:
feat(dashboard): add pause/resume toggle for agents (#84)

Adds on/off toggle button to each agent card (except supervisor).
When paused: agent shows 'paused' state, cadence shows 'paused',
next run shows 'paused', card gets red border + reduced opacity,
and a 'paused' badge appears next to the name in the cadence matrix.

Server: POST /api/pause/:agent and /api/resume/:agent endpoints
that write cadence_<agent> to 0 (with backup) and stop/kick the agent.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
